title: Better Elytra
description: A mod that adds basic physic to the elytra.
body:
# Better Elytra

[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=000000&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/project/better-elytra)[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=222222&color=888888)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-elytra)


When a player wears an elytra and isn't flying, it gives them a gliding effect, allowing them to avoid falls in emergencies without actually using the elytra. Therefore, it's practical to wear it even when you're not using it!

## Installation


###     Install Fabric Loader

Download and install Fabric Loader from Fabric's official website.

###     Install Fabric API
Download the Fabric API.

###     Install Better Elytra Mod
Download the latest version of Better Elytra from Modrinth or Curseforge.
Place the JAR file in the mods folder.

###     Launch The Minecraft
